user_system_path: Public homepage image swap: use the supplied homepage PNGs as the actual visual layer, keep only the homepage surface in scope, overlay the two real CTA hotspots, and do not touch backend, dashboard, auth, connectors, or live sends.
allowed_files_raw: Homepage image layer + contract file only; public PNG assets allowed.
forbidden_files_raw: No backend, dashboard, auth, connectors, billing, schema, inbox/task-list, or live-send changes.
required_local_proof: npm run health; npm run lint; npm run build; npm run gate:frontend
required_browser_proof: Desktop and mobile screenshots proving the homepage image swap and CTA hotspots
acceptance_condition: The public homepage renders from the supplied PNGs as the actual visual target, the two CTAs remain clickable, and no backend/dashboard/auth/connectors behavior is changed.
stop_condition: Stop once one PR is opened for issue #62 with homepage image-swap proof and screenshots.
next_command: Open one PR for issue #62 homepage-only scope and stop.
